LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RANJAN CHARAN'S MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. CHARAN IS THE PREVAILING PARTY. CCP SECTION 1032. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PROVIDES FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES TO PREVAILING PARTY. CCP SECTION 1033.5 ALLOWS FOR COSTS THAT ARE REASONABLY NECESSARY TO THE CONDUCT OF LITIGATION. ONE TRIP TO SAN FRANCISCO WAS NOT NECESSARY. $971.82 AWARDED.(PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) (302/CWW)JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR 5759

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs;
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RANJAN CHARAN'S Motion for Award of Attorney's Fees and Costs. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for award of attorney fees and costs is granted. Charan is the prevailing party. CCP section 1032. Settlement agreement provides for reasonable attorneys' fees to prevailing party. CCP section 1033.5 allows for costs that are reasonably necessary to the conduct of litigation. One trip to San Francisco was not necessary. $971.82 awarded.(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Notice Of Motion To Restore Action To Calendar And To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff, Sayed R. Hussain's Motion to restore action to calendar and enforce settlement agreement. Connie Tche, Esq. of Taylor, Goins, Stallworth, (510) 893-9465, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Ranjan Charan, Defendant in Pro Per, (831) 524-3430, appearing and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Charan not a party to the settlement agreement. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Mtn To Grant Atty'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RANJAN CHARAN'S Motion to Grant Attorney's Fees and Costs. Connie Tche, Esq. of Taylor, Goins, Stallworth, (510) 893-9465, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Ranjan Charan, Defendant in Pro Per, (831) 524-3430, appearing and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, insufficient notice per CCP section 1005. (302/CWW/VC)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
